content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Vinculum Services: Amazon Delivery Manager Anywhere in the World 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇪🇨 Ecuador, 🇬🇹 Guatemala, 🇳🇮 Nicaragua, 🇵🇭 Philippines, 🇺🇾 Uruguay, and 🇻🇪 Venezuela (Bolivarian Republic of) Alabama Amazon and Amazon Seller Central All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5090/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Colorado, USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://thinkvinculum.com">http://thinkvinculum.com</a> </p> <p>We are looking for a sharp, systems-minded professional who thrives on keeping a fast-moving agency engine running. You are the "source of truth" for our internal teams—someone who doesn’t just track tasks but owns the flow of work across Marketing, Seller Ops, and Creative. You are not an order-taker; you are an accountability partner who ensures nothing slips through the cracks, holding everyone from Analysts to Directors to their commitments.</p> <p>If you are a systems thinker who "speaks" Amazon (ACoS, Buy Box, Brand Registry), masters ClickUp, and takes pride in running a tight, async operation, this is the role for you. We are a U.S.-based e-commerce consultancy where our Delivery Managers are the backbone of our execution. You are proactive, comfortable "managing up," and expert at turning complex discussions into clear, actionable SOPs and workflows.</p> <p>We are selective about who joins our team, and our hiring process reflects that. We want people who follow through, pay attention, and take initiative—starting with how they apply.</p> <p>Get more details here: <a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/15rNk34qzR7KgKkIecc50FrlHh9q2PkRB/view?usp=sharing">https://drive.google.com/file/d/15rNk34qzR7KgKkIecc50FrlHh9q2PkRB/view?usp=sharing</a></p> <p>IMPORTANT: TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST COMPLETE THE APPLICATION FORM PROVIDED IN THE LINK ABOVE. APPLICATIONS SUBMITTED WITHOUT A COMPLETED FORM WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vinculum-services-amazon-delivery-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vinculum-services-amazon-delivery-manager</a></p> Tue, 12 May 2026 17:09:51 +0000 Thu, 11 Jun 2026 17:09:51 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vinculum-services-amazon-delivery-manager https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vinculum-services-amazon-delivery-manager Seen: Link Building & Outreach Manager (SaaS Listicles + Brand Mentions) Anywhere in the World All Other Remote Contract <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Spain Barcelona </p> <p>Seen is an AI SEO and GEO agency helping SaaS companies grow visibility on Google and AI search platforms.</p> <p>We work with ambitious SaaS brands that care about pipeline and revenue, not vanity metrics. Our clients include Aura, Artisan, Hunter, Riverside, Sphere, Nextiva, just to name a few.</p> <p>Our mission is simple: help SaaS companies get found, build authority, and turn search visibility into revenue.</p> <p>We’re a lean, fast-moving remote team focused on real results.</p> <p><strong>The role</strong></p> <p>We’re hiring an Outreach Manager to own and scale our link building + brand mentions engine.</p> <p>This is not a basic VA outreach role.</p> <p>We’re looking for someone proactive, commercial, organized, and sharp — someone who understands that every quality placement, relationship, backlink, and mention can directly impact rankings, traffic, pipeline, and AI visibility.</p> <p>You’ll work closely with our founder Irina and SEO/GEO Manager Cindy to help grow authority for our clients.</p> <h2>Tasks</h2> <ul> <li>Run cold outreach campaigns to secure backlinks, guest posts, brand mentions, listicle placements, and strategic partnerships</li> <li>Build and manage long-term relationships with editors, publishers, and website owners in the SaaS space</li> <li>Execute link building campaigns for clients based on monthly priorities and KPIs</li> <li>Manage the full guest post process from prospecting to publication</li> <li>Keep outreach pipelines, trackers, and reporting organized and up to date</li> <li>Improve and automate workflows to increase efficiency and results</li> <li>Take ownership of the process and consistently push campaigns forward</li> </ul> <h2>Requirements</h2> <ul> <li>Experience in cold outreach, link building, or partnerships</li> <li>SaaS or B2B experience preferred</li> <li>Strong written English and communication skills</li> <li>Organized, proactive, and reliable with follow-ups</li> <li>Able to work independently and own results</li> <li>3+ hours overlap with European time zones</li> </ul> <h2>Benefits</h2> <ul> <li>Fully remote role</li> <li>Flexible schedule, results matter more than hours</li> <li>Unlimited time off</li> <li>Small but very productive team where your work truly matters</li> <li>Learn advanced SEO, GEO, AI search, growth systems, and automations</li> <li>Opportunity to grow into a bigger role</li> </ul> <p>This role can become much more than outreach if you’re ambitious.</p> <p><strong>Hiring process</strong></p> <ol> <li>Short application + answers to a few questions</li> <li>Intro chat</li> <li>Test task + feedback</li> <li>Final interview</li> </ol> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/seen-link-building-outreach-manager-saas-listicles-brand-mentions">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/seen-link-building-outreach-manager-saas-listicles-brand-mentions</a></p> We partner with leading AI labs and product companies to improve their tools across design, video, development, and beyond. We believe human input will always be at the center of net new creation, and our mission is to help shape technology so human creativity can be amplified to create what today is unimaginable.</p> <p>
